'''yaloyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waboom|waboom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waboom|waboom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yaloyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæleyeth|yæleyeth]] || [[word:yæleyej|yæleyej]] || [[word:yæleyesh|yæleyesh]] || [[word:yæleye|yæleye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yaloloyoth|yaloloyoth]] || [[word:yaloloyoj|yaloloyoj]] || [[word:yaloloyosh|yaloloyosh]] || [[word:yaloloyo|yaloloyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yaloyoth|yaloyoth]] || [[word:yaloyoj|yaloyoj]] || [[word:yaloyosh|yaloyosh]] || [[word:yaloyo|yaloyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yalofyoth|yalofyoth]] || [[word:yalofyoj|yalofyoj]] || [[word:yalofyosh|yalofyosh]] || [[word:yalofyof|yalofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yaloyotho|yaloyotho]] || [[word:yaloyojo|yaloyojo]] || [[word:yaloyosho|yaloyosho]] || [[word:yaloyoko|yaloyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yaloyoth|yaloyoth]] || [[word:yaloyoj|yaloyoj]] || [[word:yaloyosh|yaloyosh]] || [[word:yaloyo|yaloyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yaloyothol|yaloyothol]] || [[word:yaloyojol|yaloyojol]] || [[word:yaloyoshol|yaloyoshol]] || [[word:yaloyokol|yaloyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yaloyothotho|yaloyothotho]] || [[word:yaloyojojo|yaloyojojo]] || [[word:yaloyoshosho|yaloyoshosho]] || [[word:yaloyoko|yaloyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yaloyothon|yaloyothon]] || [[word:yaloyojon|yaloyojon]] || [[word:yaloyoshon|yaloyoshon]] || [[word:yaloyokon|yaloyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yaloyothoro|yaloyothoro]] || [[word:yaloyojoro|yaloyojoro]] || [[word:yaloyoshoro|yaloyoshoro]] || [[word:yaloyokoro|yaloyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
